mapper.select: SELECT max_password_fail_count FROM om_config_m WHERE id = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT id , max_password_fail_count AS maxPasswordFailCount , max_inactive_login_days AS maxInactiveLoginDays , allow_duplicate_login AS allowDuplicateLogin , smtp_host AS smtpHost , smtp_port AS smtpPort , smtp_username AS smtpUsername , smtp_password_enc AS smtpPasswordEnc , smtp_from_email AS smtpFromEmail , smtp_from_name AS smtpFromName , smtp_use_tls AS smtpUseTls , smtp_use_ssl AS smtpUseSsl , smtp_auth_required AS smtpAuthRequired , smtp_connection_timeout_ms AS smtpConnectionTimeoutMs , smtp_read_timeout_ms AS smtpReadTimeoutMs , smtp_write_timeout_ms AS smtpWriteTimeoutMs FROM om_config_m WHERE id = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO om_config_m ( id, max_password_fail_count, max_inactive_login_days, allow_duplicate_login, smtp_use_tls, smtp_use_ssl, smtp_auth_required, smtp_connection_timeout_ms, smtp_read_timeout_ms, smtp_write_timeout_ms ) VALUES (1, 5, 90, false, true, false, true, 10000, 10000, 10000) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING
